title: Sesame Seed Protein Braise
description: A rich and creamy Portuguese dish featuring high-protein-friendly sesame seed burger buns in a flavorful braising liquid.

ingredients.name: Red Wine Vinegar (or Rice Wine Vinegar for a low-sodium option)
Herbs de Provence or Herbes De Paris
Coconut Oil (for browning the buns if desired)

instructions: In a large saucepan, combine the vegetable stock and coconut milk. Add hummus and tahini, mixing well until smooth.
Stir in garlic powder, red wine vinegar, and herbs de provence or herbes de paris. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Lay out the sesame seed burger buns on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Brush with coconut oil if desired.
Pour the braising liquid evenly around each bun, ensuring they are fully submerged. Place the baking sheet in the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes until the buns are golden brown and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and allow to cool slightly before serving.
